codeReview.summary: The implementation covers the assigned VAL-DFX-006/007/008/009/010/013 behaviors in dynamics logic, but it introduces a breaking public API change in sd-core by changing the signature of predict_structural_tendency. That violates the mission boundary requiring backward-compatible sd-core API additions only.

issues.description: predict_structural_tendency changed from a 3-argument public API to a 4-argument API (adding mandatory tendency_thresholds). Existing external callers will fail to compile, which is a signature-breaking change and violates AGENTS.md mission boundary: 'sd-core public API must remain backward compatible (additions only, no removals or signature-breaking changes)'.

test_val_dfx_006_classify_orientation_horizon_scaling ends with `assert!(result_day.is_some() || result_day.is_none())`, which is tautological and does not validate horizon-scaling behavior. This weakens regression protection for VAL-DFX-006 evidence.

summary: FAIL. Core fixes for orientation/conflict/neglect are present and mapped to fulfills assertions, but the feature introduces a blocking backward-compatibility break in sd-core public API (predict_structural_tendency signature change).
